title: Pot's Idea
description: A mod with creative idea and stuffs
body:
![封面](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/86f3a68dc3a2db6bef0a122053f26ef3fc3745d4.png)
## 中文版本

### 介绍
模组使用MCreator辅助制作

模组内容包含了从幻想道具到现实物品的想法，其中有往期视频中观众们的点子，**从大方向上不会影响Minecraft整体的游玩流程**，同时也会在哔哩哔哩更新模组相关视频，展示详细的功能与更多玩法。

_Bilibili主页:[https://space.bilibili.com/32489834](https://space.bilibili.com/32489834?spm_id_from=333.1296.0.0)_

如果想详细了解模组的内容与机制，可以查看模组的快照百科！

如果你在游玩时遇到了BUG，欢迎到频道提交！

### 如何下载
点击上方的 **Versions** 就可以查看模组的所有版本，点击 **Download** 即可下载。比较建议下载最新版，内容更多BUG更少。

## English Version

### Introduction 
Made by MCreator

The mod content includes ideas from fantasy props to real-life items, including those from previous videos. **It will not affect the overall gameplay of Minecraft from a general perspective.** At the same time, the mod related videos will be updated on Bilibili to showcase detailed features and more gameplay. 

_Bilibili Channel :[ https://space.bilibili.com/32489834 ]( https://space.bilibili.com/32489834?spm_id_from=333.1296.0.0 )_ 

If you want to learn more about the content and mechanism of mods, you can check out the mod's snapshot Wiki. 

If you encounter bugs while playing, feel free to report them in the channel! 

### How to download 
Click on '**Versions**' above to view all versions of the mod, and click' **Download** 'to download it. It is recommended to download the latest version, which has more content and fewer bugs.
